holdings.infoBox: SSMG is an equity ETF with a total of 81 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sterling Infrastructure stock at 4.20%, Bloom Energy at 3.30%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 3.23%, Carpenter Technology at 3.20%, and FTAI Aviation at 3.13%.

overview.description: The Virtus Silvant Small/Mid Growth ETF (SSMG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund actively manages a portfolio of small to mid-cap US companies with above-average growth potential. SSMG was launched on Apr 21, 2026 and is issued by Virtus Investment Partners.
